seoTitle: Camden Head vs Camden South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camden Head and Camden South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camden Head vs Camden South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camden Head and Camden South.
heading: Camden Head vs Camden South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camden Head, New South Wales and Camden South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden South has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Camden Head (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camden Head or Camden South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camden Head has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Camden South scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camden Head scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Camden South scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camden Head or Camden South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
